_comment: Connection-manifest for the OPERATOR-ONLY Rescue Rangers department. Posture-only: it declares WHICH env keys the rescue path depends on so verify-wiring can confirm they are SET — it NEVER contains a value. The webhook URL + fleet secret are seeded fleet-wide at onboarding (install.sh); the push secret is OPERATOR-BOX-ONLY (the receiver's Cloudflare-tunnel auth) and is therefore not required on client boxes.

connection_points.name: rescue-rangers-webhook-url
connection_points.description: Public n8n webhook URL every fleet box POSTs its escalation to (outbound-only). Seeded at onboarding; default https://main.blackceoautomations.com/webhook/rescue-rangers.

connection_points.name: rescue-rangers-webhook-secret
connection_points.description: Shared fleet secret sent as X-Rescue-Secret so the relay Auth Check accepts the escalation (clean 403 otherwise). Seeded alongside the URL.

connection_points.name: rescue-push-secret
connection_points.description: OPERATOR-BOX-ONLY: authenticates the relay's push to the operator receiver over the dedicated rescue Cloudflare tunnel. Not present on client boxes by design.

deferred_live_dependencies: n8n Relay Brain redeploy (nine-field validation + status branch) — operator-run, pre-change JSON export + staging test first
VPS outbound-only status-poll return leg armed on live VPS client boxes (batched fleet roll)
